summary: Decent 1994 performance with a solid first set and lackluster second set; recording quality not described.
review: The reviewer finds the show generally decent, noting that the first set was fairly well played while the second set felt lackluster despite being competently performed. No specifics about the audio source or sound quality are provided, making it unclear how the recording sounds.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated (3‑star) review; the reviewer describes the performance as average and gives no details on audio quality, leading to a cautious middle rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type; recording quality cannot be confidently assessed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as fairly well played; second set called lackluster but still performed well. Overall deemed a decent final show of the run.
